prompt_text: A tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, seen only as a restrained subjective presence from inside the bedchamber, watching the closed door in silence with wary clarity and suffocating calm.
